raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context and priorities","name":"What's been most on your mind in this new team context?","description":"Lets Tom set the frame around what is taking up attention after the move without presuming a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible principal impact","name":"What piece of your work has had the clearest leverage for the team lately?","description":"Surfaces where his impact is actually visible versus just steady delivery.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal scope signal","name":"What does Principal scope mean on this team in practice?","description":"Checks whether Tom has a current, team-specific model of the bar rather than an old one.","purpose":"topic","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation alignment","name":"When a cross-team dependency is shaky, how do you set expectations early?","description":"Tests whether he is proactively shaping alignment before issues harden.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Questioning habits","name":"What kinds of questions are you not asking yet that would change the work?","description":"Probes whether his low question volume is a deliberate choice or a missed lever.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Tradeoff calls","name":"Where are you making the tradeoff call yourself instead of pushing it up?","description":"Looks for Principal-level judgment in ambiguous situations rather than safe execution.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation threshold","name":"What makes you decide to escalate versus keep driving it yourself?","description":"Surfaces the decision rule behind his judgment calls and whether it is calibrated to the role.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust building","name":"Where do you think cross-team trust is strongest right now?","description":"Finds the relationships or behaviors that are starting to earn confidence across teams.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Safe mode check","name":"What feels safest to stay in, and what would it take to step beyond that?","description":"Gets at whether he is defaulting to reliable execution instead of broader Principal impact.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":-1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next commitment","name":"What is the first concrete change you want to make before our next review?","description":"Closes on a specific behavioral commitment with a near-term horizon.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
